mapper.select: select o.customer_id, o.sales_user_id, count(o.order_id) as order_count, coalesce(sum(o.final_amount), 0) as total_amount, coalesce(sum(f.paid_amount), 0) as paid_amount, coalesce(sum(f.unpaid_amount), 0) as unpaid_amount from oms_order o left join oms_finance f on f.order_id = o.order_id and f.finance_type = '1' and f.del_flag = '0' where o.del_flag = '0' and o.order_status not in ('REJECTED', 'CANCELLED') and ( #{statType} = 'DAILY' and DATE(o.order_date) = DATE(#{statDate}) or #{statType} = 'MONTHLY' and DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', #{statDate}::date) or #{statType} = 'QUARTERLY' and DATE_TRUNC('quarter', o.order_date) = DATE_TRUNC('quarter', #{statDate}::date) or #{statType} = 'YEARLY' and DATE_TRUNC('year', o.order_date) = DATE_TRUNC('year', #{statDate}::date) ) group by o.customer_id, o.sales_user_id
mapper.insert: insert into oms_order_statistics(stat_date, stat_type, customer_id, sales_user_id, order_count, total_amount, paid_amount, unpaid_amount, create_time) values(#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{customerId}, #{salesUserId}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{unpaidAmount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

insert into oms_order_statistics(stat_date, stat_type, customer_id, sales_user_id, order_count, total_amount, paid_amount, unpaid_amount, create_time) values(#{statDate}, #{statType}, #{customerId}, #{salesUserId}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{unpaidAmount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) on conflict(stat_date, stat_type, customer_id, sales_user_id) do update set order_count = excluded.order_count, total_amount = excluded.total_amount, paid_amount = excluded.paid_amount, unpaid_amount = excluded.unpaid_amount
